suite.name: Blog Tests
suite.source: C:\Users\lowel\OneDrive\Рабочий стол\магістатура 1 курс\2 семестр\Автоматизація тестування програмного забезпечення\blog_app\tests\robot\blog_tests.robot

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Set Selenium Timeout
kw.doc: Sets the timeout that is used by various keywords.

test.name: TC-01 Сторінка реєстрації відкривається коректно

kw.name: Очистити сесію
Delete All Cookies
kw.doc: Deletes all cookies.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.
Видаляє cookies — гарантує неавторизований стан перед тестом

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.name: Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.

test.name: TC-02 Успішна реєстрація нового користувача

kw.name: Очистити сесію
Delete All Cookies
kw.doc: Deletes all cookies.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Безпечний клік
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Scroll Element Into View
kw.doc: Scrolls the element identified by ``locator`` into view.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.
Прокручує до елемента і клікає через JS щоб уникнути перекриття

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Створити пост
Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'Тестовий пост Robot Framework' into text field 'id=title'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'Короткий опис тестового поста' into text field 'id=description'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'Детальний текст поста, що створено через Robot Framework Keyword Driven Testing.' into text field 'id=body'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Безпечний клік
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Scroll Element Into View
kw.doc: Scrolls the element identified by ``locator`` into view.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.msg: Executing JavaScript: document.querySelector('#post').click() Without any arguments.
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.
Прокручує до елемента і клікає через JS щоб уникнути перекриття

kw.arg: Детальний текст поста, що створено через Robot Framework Keyword Driven Testing.

kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.

kw.msg: Current page contains text 'Blog Post posted successfully!'.
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.msg: Current page contains text 'Тестовий пост Robot Framework'.
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

Видаляє cookies — гарантує неавторизований стан перед тестом

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Click Link
kw.doc: Clicks a link identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Page Should Not Contain Element
kw.msg: Current page does not contain element 'id=add_comment'.
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` is not found on the current page.

test.name: TC-20 Успішне додавання коментаря до поста

kw.name: Очистити сесію
Delete All Cookies
kw.doc: Deletes all cookies.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Безпечний клік
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Scroll Element Into View
kw.doc: Scrolls the element identified by ``locator`` into view.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.msg: Executing JavaScript: document.querySelector('#login').click() Without any arguments.
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.
Прокручує до елемента і клікає через JS щоб уникнути перекриття

kw.name: Перевірити що сторінка містить текст
Page Should Contain
kw.msg: Current page contains text 'Comment added to the Post successfully!'.
